title: Oreocallis grandiflora
taxonomy: Oreocallis grandiflora is a species within the family Proteaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the protea family. Members of the Proteaceae family are primarily found in the Southern Hemisphere and are native to Australia, New Zealand, and South Africa. The Proteaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Proteoideae, Grevilleoideae, and Placospermatoideae. The classification of Oreocallis grandiflora is consistent with its inclusion in the Proteaceae family.
